[30;1m17005 | [0m[35m  var slug = base64[0m
[30;1m17006 | [0m[35m              .replace(/\+/g, '-')  // Replace + with - (see RFC 4648, sec. 5)[0m
[30;1m17007 | [0m[35m              .replace(/\//g, '_')  // Replace / with _ (see RFC 4648, sec. 5)[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m76[0m[34m of [0m[33m467[0m[31m ]--[0m
